title: Carpet LAS Addition
description: This is a extension for Carpet
body:
Carpet LAS Addition is a extension for Carpet  
It adds some useful features  
It is currently in early beta  

---

## Note:

**Carpet and FabricAPI Required!!!**

---

## Basic information:

Author: Fanzhitianyu  
Helpers: ABxl_lly,yizhi9jiyan9,Typogalaxy  
Affiliation：LazyAlienServer -- Computer Technology Research Team  
Purpose：To assist in redstone machine design and redstone technology research.

---

## Functions:  

- ### NoteBlockLoading
Above the charge there is a 24-stop note box with an blue orchid pot loads 300gt Chunk [Strong: 3*3, Weak: 5*5, Boundary 7*7]
- ### Minecart Drop Mechanism Modified  
Replace the minecart drop mechanism with version 1.18.2 with the drop mechanism in version 1.19
- ### Ender Pearl Chunk loading
Allow horizontally moving ender pearls to force chunk loading
- ### Compost Grade Modification
Any item placed in the bin will add one level to the bin [you need to right-click the bin once after each setting change to apply the current setting]  
- ### SpongeReproduction
Use bone_meal on the sponge, the sponge will randomly convert nearby water sources into wet sponges in lukewarm_ocean or warm_ocean

Want to know more? [here](https://github.com/UnknownBits/Carpet-LAS-Addition#readme)
